properties.SQL Query:
SELECT customer_sk AS pk_dim, customer_unique_id AS customer_unique_id_r, date_to, is_current
FROM dim_customer
WHERE customer_unique_id = '${CustomerUniqueID}'
AND is_current = 1
AND date_to IS NULL

properties.SQL Statement:
INSERT INTO dim_customer
(
  customer_id,
  customer_unique_id,
  name,
  gender,
  age,
  age_group,
  phone,
  zip_code_prefix,
  city,
  state,
  date_from,
  date_to,
  is_current
)
VALUES
(
  '${CustomerID_sql}',
  '${CustomerUniqueID_sql}',
  '${Name_sql}',
  '${Gender_sql}',
  ${Age_sql},
  '${age_group}',
  '${Phone_sql}',
  '${Zip_sql}',
  '${City_sql}',
  '${State_sql}',
  SYSDATE,
  NULL,
  1
)

UPDATE dim_customer
SET
  date_to = SYSDATE,
  is_current = 0
WHERE customer_sk = ${CustomerSKR}
  AND is_current = 1
  AND date_to IS NULL
